title: Vector Push
description: Create a new growable vector and add elements to it using the push method.
problemStatement:
Dynamic arrays! Create a mutable `Vec<i32>` using `vec![]` or `Vec::new()`. Push the numbers `10, 20, 30` into it and print the entire vector.

**Requirement:** Use the `println!("{:?}", v)` syntax to print the vector's contents.
hints: Vectors are stored on the heap and can grow or shrink in size.
